subject: Discrete Random Variables
topic: §16 Expected Value of a Function of a Discrete Random Variable
question: A random variable $X$ has the following probability mass function defined in tabular form x -1 1 2 p(x) 2c 3c 4c (a) Find the value of $c$. (b) Compute $p(-1), p(1)$, and $p(2)$. (c) Find $E(X)$ and $E(X^2)$.
